name: MSI MPG B850I EDGE TI WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - Support DDR5-8200(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - USB 20Gbps Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5Gb LAN - 802.11be Wi-Fi 7 - Bluetooth 5.4 (MPGB850IEDGEWIFI)
shortName: MSI MPG B850I EDGE TI WIFI Mini-ITX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x
description: Compact AM5 mini-ITX motherboard with PCIe 5.0, Wi-Fi 7, and 20Gbps USB for high-performance small form factor builds.
